description: REAL baseline: 12-layer stories110m (.esp bundle, hybrid decode + Metal fused SDPA)
2-LAYER TRUNCATED (first 2 layers, NO training): 259 tok/s — EXCEEDS TARGET but quality is garbage (immediate repetition)
6-LAYER TRUNCATED (first 6 layers, no training): 130 tok/s — degraded quality
4-LAYER TRUNCATED (first 4 layers, no training): 170 tok/s — poor but readable
2-LAYER TRAINED (1000 steps on TinyStories) + ESPRESSO_DISABLE_METAL_FUSED_SDPA=1: 282 tok/s — EXCEEDS 250 TARGET, quality still poor (repeats 'parl') due to insufficient training data
4-LAYER TRAINED (1000 steps): 175 tok/s — quality also poor (repeats 'Him')

commit: - Disabling Metal fused SDPA gives 15% speedup (282 vs 244 tok/s) for 2-layer model
- Training data is only 16KB (32 sequences × 256 tokens) — grossly insufficient for quality
- Both 2-layer and 4-layer trained models fall into repetition after ~20 tokens
- To achieve 250 tok/s WITH GOOD QUALITY: need larger dataset + 10k+ training steps
